spec_match.rationale: Correctly outlines reading-nav selectors and scroll groups.

interactive.rationale: Very neat article scroller with active sidebar highlighting and comparative panels.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly describes how this replaces JavaScript IntersectionObservers.

edge_cases.rationale: Robust polyfill using IntersectionObserver when the feature is unsupported.

references.rationale: Excellent see also links pointing at related demos.

design_system.rationale: High-quality clean borders matching standard showcase styling.

summary: A classic sidebar TOC indicator driving section tracking, highlighting scroll-target-group simplicity.
